title: notopterygium forbesii subsp. oviforme
intro: Notopterygium forbesii subsp. oviforme, also known as Qiang Huo, is a type of plant that belongs to the Apiaceae family, native to the mountainous regions of China. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and analgesic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Notopterygium forbesii subsp. oviforme include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and improving respiratory health, making it a popular herb in traditional Chinese medicine. The herbal preparation of Qiang Huo typically involves drying and processing the roots or rhizomes, which can be made into teas, capsules, or infused into oils for topical use.
